recommendations.action: Increase event log sizes and enable all critical logs
recommendations.command: GPO: Computer Configuration → Security Settings → Event Log → 128MB+

recommendations.action: Disable built-in Administrator and remove unnecessary admins

recommendations.command: Start Windows Update and install all critical updates

recommendations.action: Remove Everyone/Authenticated Users from share ACLs
Enable Windows Firewall on all profiles
Enforce password complexity, minimum length ≥12, max age ≤90 days
recommendations.command: Configure via Group Policy: Account Policies → Password Policy
Use Add/Remove Programs or winget to remove obsolete software

recommendations.action: Disable LLMNR and NetBIOS via GPO and NIC settings
recommendations.command: GPO: Turn Off Multicast Name Resolution = Enabled

recommendations.action: Enable Network Level Authentication for RDP
Enable Windows Defender and update signatures
